note: As-built (after): the LEAN cockpit board render flow, shipped exactly as the plan's intended design. viewBoard() renders no needs-you strip; renderCard()'s row 3 is 'status pill + conditional agent chip' (no phase dots); activeAgent(f) maps phase->agent and the chip shows only when hasLiveSession && !WaitingForInput(); needsYouCount() feeds the header count (replaced gates()); the heavy | left border (stripeAccent) is the sole act-now cue; colAvail() = height-5. Presentation-only over the SAME contract.Repo. The plan-time as-is baseline is copied into report/before/.

diagrams.title: Lean board render flow (as-built): no strip, no phase dots; row3 = status pill + live-only agent chip; left border = the gate cue
